title: Volunteering 志愿者服务
scene: 在社区服务中心报名参加志愿者

lines.en: Hi! Thanks for coming in. Are you interested in volunteering?
lines.zh: 嗨！感谢您过来。您对志愿服务感兴趣吗？

lines.en: Yes, I'd love to help out in my free time.
lines.zh: 是的，我想在空闲时间帮忙。

lines.en: That's wonderful. What kind of work are you interested in?
lines.zh: 太棒了。您对什么类型的工作感兴趣？

lines.en: I'm good with kids, so maybe something at the after-school program.
lines.zh: 我擅长和孩子相处，所以也许可以在课后活动项目中帮忙。

lines.en: Perfect timing. We need tutors for homework help every Tuesday.
lines.zh: 时机正好。我们每周二需要辅导作业的志愿者。

lines.en: Tuesday works for me. What time should I be there?
lines.zh: 周二我可以。我应该几点到？

lines.en: From four to six in the afternoon. We provide training too.
lines.zh: 下午四点到六点。我们也会提供培训。

lines.en: Great. Do I need to fill out an application form?
lines.zh: 太好了。我需要填写申请表吗？

lines.en: Yes, please. We also need to run a quick background check.
lines.zh: 是的，请填一下。我们还需要做一个简单的背景调查。

lines.en: No problem. I'm excited to get started!
